items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Focus on maintaining a steady heart rate in zone 2 (130-145 bpm). Include a 10-minute warm-up and a 5-minute cool-down.

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Perform a full-body weight training session with 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise: squats, lunges, push-ups, and rows. Rest for 60 seconds between sets. Aim for a heart rate around 120-140 bpm during the workout.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, complete 5x500m intervals at a pace of 5:00 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes afterward.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate in zone 1 (below 130 bpm) to promote recovery.
